The gap is especially important for AI agents, whose
articles.summary: LongStraw 针对 RL 后训练中上下文长度远落后于推理部署（已近百万 token）的问题，在固定 GPU 预算下将 RL 后训练扩展至 2M token 以上。通过系统性工程优化，解决长序列训练的显存与计算瓶颈，使 AI 智能体在长上下文任务中无需依赖部署时的长度泛化，直接在训练阶段覆盖实际使用的上下文范围。

articles.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. Despite this progress, current open-source models remain limited in several ways. They often struggle to generalize across diverse video types, making
articles.summary: VideoChat3 是一个全开源的视频多模态大语言模型，针对现有开源模型难以跨多样化视频类型泛化的问题，整合运动理解、长视频处理与流式交互能力，实现高效通用的视频理解。模型完全开放权重与训练细节，旨在推动视频理解向真实世界应用落地，覆盖更广泛的视频场景。

articles.title: Boogu-Image-0.1: Boosting Open-Source Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
articles.excerpt: We introduce Boogu-Image-0.1, an open-source unified multimodal understanding and generation model family, comprising Base, Turbo, Edit, and Edit-Turbo variants. It delivers competitive performance in high-quality text-to-image generation, fast inference, instruction-based editing, and bilingual (Ch
articles.summary: Boogu-Image-0.1 是开源统一多模态理解与生成模型系列，包含 Base、Turbo、Edit 和 Edit-Turbo 四个变体。支持高质量文本到图像生成、快速推理、指令驱动图像编辑及中英双语，在多模态理解与生成任务上达到竞争性性能，为开源社区提供兼顾效率与功能的统一多模态基础模型。

articles.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards without human-annotated data, often referred to as zero RL, has emerged as a powerful paradigm for eliciting chain-of-thought reasoning. However, due to computational constraints, existing studies are largely restricted to small models, leaving the trai
articles.summary: Ring-Zero 将无需人工标注数据的 zero RL 范式扩展至万亿参数规模，突破现有研究受计算约束仅限小模型的瓶颈。通过 Ring 并行等分布式训练技术，在超大模型上训练出具备 Chain-of-Thought 推理能力的模型，验证 zero RL 在大规模参数下的涌现推理效果，填补大模型 RL 训练的规模化空白。

articles.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards offer limite
articles.summary: SEED 提出自进化在策略蒸馏方法，用于智能体强化学习。针对基于结果的 RL 稀疏轨迹级奖励提供有限学习信号的问题，SEED 结合在策略蒸馏与 RL，让学生模型在与环境交互中不断自我进化，获取更密集的过程监督信号，提升多轮交互、工具使用等长时域智能体任务的训练效率与性能。

articles.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in Tool-Integrated Large Language Models have made web search a core capability of information-seeking agents. However, as interaction histories grow, agents increasingly struggle to track task progress. When search attempts fail to yield useful evidence, current single- and multi-ag
articles.summary: SearchOS-V1 针对开放域信息检索智能体在交互历史增长时难以追踪任务进展、搜索失败后单/多智能体系统均陷入困境的问题，构建鲁棒的多智能体协作框架。通过结构化任务追踪与智能体间协作机制，提升 Web 搜索密集型信息检索任务的成功率与可靠性。

articles.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
articles.excerpt: World-action models (WAMs) are emerging as a promising foundation for embodied control: rather than predicting actions alone, they learn representations that couple action generation with future world prediction. This coupling is often viewed as a source of robustness, interpretability, and safety,
articles.summary: BadWAM 揭示世界-动作模型（WAM）的安全漏洞：WAM 将动作生成与未来世界预测耦合，通常被视为鲁棒性来源，但本文证明该耦合可被攻击者利用——模型可能在世界预测上表现正常，却在动作输出上被恶意操控。提出针对 WAM 的后门攻击方案，警示具身控制领域对耦合表征安全性的忽视。

articles.title: AgentCompass: A Unified Evaluation Infrastructure for Agent Capabilities
articles.excerpt: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into autonomous agents, the need for unified evaluation infrastructure becomes critical. However, current evaluation pipelines remain highly fragmented and tightly coupled, hindering reproducibility and causing redundant engineering. To address this, we introdu
articles.summary: AgentCompass 提出统一的 LLM 智能体能力评测基础设施，解决当前评测流程高度碎片化、强耦合导致可复现性差和重复工程开销大的问题。通过模块化、解耦的评测框架，整合多类智能体任务与环境，支持跨平台一致性评估，降低研究人员开展智能体能力系统性评测的门槛。

articles.title: KeyFrame-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Keyframe-Conditioned Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Video generation increasingly relies on keyframe-based workflows, where creators specify a sequence of reference images to guide generation. Although recent models support multi-keyframe conditioning, it remains unclear whether they can faithfully reproduce the prescribed keyframes while maintaining
articles.summary: KeyFrame-Compass 提出关键帧条件视频生成的综合评测基准，填补现有评测体系空白。针对创作者以参考图序列引导视频生成的工作流，系统评估模型能否忠实还原指定关键帧同时保持帧间时序连贯性，为多关键帧条件视频生成模型提供多维度量化评估体系。

articles.title: PolicyShiftGuard: Benchmarking and Improving Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrails
articles.excerpt: Image guardrails are typically trained and evaluated under a fixed safety policy, implicitly treating safety as an intrinsic property of an image. Real deployments are different: the same image may be allowed in one product, restricted in another, and newly disallowed when a policy boundary changes.
articles.summary: PolicyShiftGuard 提出图像安全防护策略自适应基准与改进方法。现有图像护栏在固定安全策略下训练，无法适应真实部署中同一图像在不同产品或策略变更下安全判断随之改变的需求。本文构建 benchmark 评估模型在策略切换时的适应能力，并提出提升策略自适应安全判断的改进方案。

articles.title: MetaView: Monocular Novel View Synthesis with Scale-Aware Implicit Geometry Priors
articles.excerpt: Current visual generation models are capable of producing high-quality content, yet they lack a coherent perception of the spatial structure. Existing generative novel view synthesis methods typically introduce explicit geometry priors, which enforce spatial consistency but inherently restrict gener
articles.summary: MetaView 解决视觉生成模型缺乏空间结构感知、难以生成几何一致新视角的问题。不同于引入显式几何先验限制生成多样性的方法，MetaView 采用尺度感知隐式几何先验，在保持生成质量与多样性的同时实现单目新视角合成，兼顾空间一致性与生成灵活性。

articles.title: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Multi-reference-to-audio-video (MR2AV) generation aims to generate coherent audio-video content conditioned on multiple references and textual instructions. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on text-driven generation, single-reference subject preservation, or isolated audio-video alignment, leaving t
articles.summary: MultiRef-Compass 针对多参考音视频生成（MR2AV）提出综合评测基准，填补现有 benchmark 仅覆盖文本驱动生成、单参考主体保持或孤立音视频对齐的局限。系统评估模型在多参考条件下同时生成语义连贯、音视频对齐内容的能力，为该方向研究提供全面量化评测标准。

articles.title: UniVR: Thinking in Visual Space for Unified Visual Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Learning broad world knowledge directly from raw visual data is a fundamental capability of intelligence. We introduce UniVR, the first investigation into simultaneously learning complex reasoning, fine-grained physical dynamics, and long-term planning from pure visual demonstrations. At its core, U
articles.summary: UniVR 首次探索从纯视觉演示中同时学习复杂推理、精细物理动态和长期规划，旨在构建直接从原始视觉数据获取广泛世界知识的统一视觉推理系统。模型在视觉空间中进行「思考」，无需语言监督，通过纯视觉轨迹学习跨任务的通用推理与规划能力。

articles.title: Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes
articles.excerpt: Human cognition does not separate understanding and generation. A teacher at a whiteboard speaks and draws together, each modality reshapes the other. In this paper, we bring this coupled loop to artificial systems. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) are ideally suited to this task, yet existing sampler
articles.summary: 受人类认知中理解与生成相互交织的启发，本文提出基于耦合 Markov 跳跃过程的统一图像理解与生成框架。以 Masked Diffusion Models（MDMs）为基础，设计新型采样器使理解与生成过程并发耦合、相互塑造，打破现有模型将两者分离处理的范式，实现更接近人类认知的多模态统一建模。

articles.title: GigaWorld-Policy-0.5: A Faster and Stronger WAM Empowered by AutoResearch
articles.excerpt: World Action Models (WAMs) improve robot policy learning by jointly modeling actions and future visual observations, using future scene evolution as dense supervision for physically grounded action generation. articles.summary: GigaWorld-Policy-0.5 改进 World Action Model（WAM）设计，现有 WAM 在推理时显式生成未来视频带来高延迟。本模型由 AutoResearch 自动化研究流程赋能，去除推理时视频生成步骤，保留未来场景演化的密集监督优势同时大幅提速，实现更快更强的机器人策略学习。

articles.title: Self-Improvements in Modern Agentic Systems: A Survey
articles.excerpt: Self-improving autonomous agents are moving from research prototypes to deployed systems. The primary goal is controllable evolution, or adaptation, from experience with minimal or even no human input. This survey frames modern self-improving agents as adaptive systems that convert experience into a
articles.summary: 本文系统综述现代智能体系统自我改进机制，将自改进智能体框架为将经验转化为能力提升的自适应系统，目标是以最少人类介入实现可控进化。涵盖从研究原型到部署系统的演进历程，梳理记忆、规划、工具使用等模块如何支撑智能体在无人工标注条件下持续自我进化。

articles.title: RxBrain: Embodied Cognition Foundation Model with Joint Language-Visual Reasoning and Imagination
articles.excerpt: Embodied cognition requires agents to connect high-level task reasoning with the physical states to be achieved. articles.summary: Hy-Embodied-RxBrain 是具身认知基础模型，将高层任务推理与需要达成的物理状态相连接。与侧重场景理解的视觉语言模型不同，该模型将语言-视觉联合推理与想象力（对未来物理状态的预测生成）结合，使智能体能够在任务规划中兼顾语言指令理解与物理世界动态感知。

articles.title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging

articles.summary: Spectral Rewiring 针对大语言模型 RL 后训练中全参数密集更新导致的两大瓶颈：推理性能受损（测试时 scaling 过早饱和）和模型合并时的干扰问题。通过谱重连技术选择性修改参数更新结构，同时改善探索效率、参数纯化与多模型合并，在保持训练效果的同时减少有害更新干扰。

articles.title: Hallo4D: Multi-Modal Hallucination Mitigation for Consistent Spatio-Temporal Generation
articles.excerpt: While recent advances in 3D generation have enabled impressive visual synthesis, existing methods often rely on 2D diffusion supervision without explicit mechanisms for geometric consistency, leading to spatial hallucinations such as duplicated structures and misaligned geometry. articles.summary: Hallo4D 解决 3D 生成中依赖 2D 扩散监督导致几何不一致（结构重复、几何错位）的空间幻觉问题，并将其扩展到时序维度的多模态幻觉缓解。通过引入显式几何一致性机制与时空联合建模，在保持视觉质量的同时实现空间结构正确、时序连贯的 4D 内容生成。

articles.title: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
